body:
Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week about the [Terrastack](startups/terrastack) round — I had a chance to dig into their updated deck and I think the carbon capture unit economics are actually stronger than they initially appeared, especially once you factor in the IRA credit stack they're eligible for. I know you mentioned Halfway has been cautious about hardware-heavy bets at seed, but I genuinely think this one might be worth a second look given how defensible their deployment model is. Would love to get on a call this week to compare notes before the term sheet deadline — I'm thinking Thursday or Friday afternoon works on my end. Let me know what you think.

— Lena
